source: source-owned DX-WWW Next Rust merge readiness audit baseline

criticalGaps.evidence: DX-owned build graph integration still relies on reference/provenance and source guards before production dx build output uses it
criticalGaps.nextAction: wire DX-owned graph and invalidation evidence into source-build receipts and cache decisions without adopting Turbopack runtime/build execution

criticalGaps.evidence: dx-www/src/cli/mod.rs remains huge and risky for merge work
criticalGaps.nextAction: extract any touched CLI behavior into small modules before adding more CLI code

criticalGaps.evidence: coordinator run reports dx-style drift fixture consumption as a blocking Lane 5 failure
criticalGaps.nextAction: fix the dx-style drift read model or demote this only after the focused source guard passes

criticalGaps.evidence: App Router build contract still reports missing .dx/build/app/server-data.json
criticalGaps.nextAction: make App Router build output write and verify server-data.json from source-owned route data

criticalGaps.evidence: dev server hot reload remains polling/overlay rather than real HMR
criticalGaps.nextAction: add a real source-owned hot-update path or keep the protocol explicitly marked as a gap

criticalGaps.evidence: coordinator run reports the default WWW template source contract as a blocking Lane 13 failure
criticalGaps.nextAction: fix the template source owner/materializer contract or update the source guard after the extraction lands

criticalGaps.evidence: coordinator run reports the build readiness gate as a blocking Lane 14 source/product proof failure
criticalGaps.nextAction: fix the readiness gate command/proof contract before using it as product readiness evidence

criticalGaps.evidence: docs/status surfaces have overstated proof compared with executable checks
criticalGaps.nextAction: replace broad proof language with proven, adapter-boundary, or unimplemented statuses

criticalGaps.evidence: public version-suffixed schema names and generated/status noise returned in several lanes
criticalGaps.nextAction: remove public version suffix noise unless a compatibility boundary requires it

nextHighestImpactAction: close one executable dx build or App Router output blocker before raising the merge score above the audit floor
